description.value: Benefit: When applied to a technique with a burst, emanation, line or spread shaped area of effect, you increase any numerical values of the technique's area by 50% (but not its range). The technique's Perform Requirements increase by 3, and the Chakra Cost increases by 2, plus 1 for every 2 Ranks of the technique (rounded up).
